title: hieracium juranum subsp. praerosum
intro: Hieracium juranum subsp. praerosum is a rare subspecies of the Hieracium juranum plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, as well as to improve overall health and well-being. Hieracium juranum subsp. praerosum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies for its numerous health benefits.
